title: Business Development Staff (Mới)
company_name: Công ty TNHH Olam Việt Nam
requirements: Education: Bachelor's degree (preferred) in Business, Food science, Agriculture, IMEX or a related field;
Experience: 1-2 years of professional experience, ideally in Sales, Customer service, Food industry, FMCG. Recent graduates are encouraged to apply;
Communication Skills: Good verbal and written communication skills with the ability to articulate our value proposition clearly and persuasively;
Drive & Persistence: Highly self-motivated, persistent, innovation and competitive with a strong desire to learn and succeed in a fast-paced environment;
Organizational Skills: time management and organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously;
Location: Phuoc Tan ward, Dong Nai province.
Willing to work in Dong Nai.
